summary: Tested Role-Based Page Access and Data Filtering. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend UI tests passed. Agent sees only MIS+Loans sidebar, redirects to /monthly-mis, cannot access /analytics, /users, /settings. Manager sees Dashboard+MIS+Loans+Analytics, cannot access /users. Admin sees all sidebar items and all data. API filtering works correctly - Agent sees only SBI/HDFC Bank loans, Manager sees team loans, Admin sees all.
passed_tests: Admin login returns admin role
Manager login returns manager role
Agent login returns agent role with assigned_banks [SBI, HDFC Bank]
Agent GET /api/loans returns only SBI and HDFC Bank loans (no ICICI)
Admin GET /api/loans returns all loans including ICICI
Manager GET /api/loans returns team loans
Agent GET /api/analytics/overview returns bank-filtered count
Admin GET /api/analytics/overview returns all loans
Manager GET /api/analytics/overview returns team-filtered count
Manager GET /api/analytics/by-bank returns team data
Agent cannot access /api/users (403 Forbidden)
Manager cannot access /api/users (403 Forbidden)
Agent sees fewer loans than Admin due to bank filtering
UI: Agent login redirects to /monthly-mis (not Dashboard)
UI: Agent sidebar shows ONLY Month MIS and Loans
UI: Agent cannot navigate to /analytics (redirects to /monthly-mis)
UI: Agent cannot navigate to /users (redirects to /monthly-mis)
UI: Agent cannot navigate to /settings (redirects to /monthly-mis)
UI: Manager sidebar shows Dashboard, Month MIS, Loans, Analytics
UI: Manager cannot navigate to /users (redirects to /)
UI: Manager CAN access /analytics
UI: Admin sidebar shows ALL items
UI: Admin CAN access /users
UI: Admin CAN access /settings
UI: Agent MIS page shows only 2 loans (HDFC Bank, SBI) - no ICICI

data_filtering.agent_bank_filter: Only sees loans from assigned_banks (SBI, HDFC Bank)
data_filtering.manager_team_filter: Sees all team member loans (no bank filter)
data_filtering.admin_no_filter: Sees all loans from all banks

context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based page access and data filtering fully tested. Agent (agent@mhpfintech.com) has assigned_banks: ['SBI', 'HDFC Bank'] and is in TEAM-A under Manager. Agent sees 2 loans (SBI, HDFC Bank), Manager sees 2 team loans, Admin sees 7 total loans. RoleGuard component in App.js handles route protection. Layout.jsx handles sidebar visibility based on role. Backend server.py uses get_accessible_user_ids() and assigned_banks filter for data access control.
